title: Tabs
description: A component that provides a tabbed interface, allowing users to switch between different views or sections of content.

sections.title: Decoration
sections.description: Example of tabs with decorative elements

sections.title: Custom Template
sections.description: Example of tabs with custom templates

sections.title: Tab with Content
sections.description: Example of tabs with associated content

sections.title: Look Variants
sections.description: Explore different visual styles for tabs using the look property.

sections.title: Location Variants
sections.description: Explore different positions for tabs using the location property.

sections.title: Disabled State
sections.description: Example showing tabs with disabled state using the disabled property.

sections.title: Event Handling
sections.description: Example showing how to handle tab change events using onActiveTabChanged.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component instance. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Sets the appearance style of the tab component

props.name: location
props.description: Specifies the position of the tab component

props.name: fitParent
props.description: Specifies whether the component should resize to fit its parent container

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Applies a minimum width constraint to the component

props.name: content
props.description: The AXTabContentDirective associated with the tab

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onActiveTabChanged
events.description: Emitted when the active tab changes

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Activates the specified tab and updates the content.
 *
 * @param tab - The tab to select, either by index (number) or by component instance
 */
select(tab: number | AXTabItemComponent)

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component instance. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: text
props.description: Defines the text content to be displayed within the component

props.name: key
props.description: Defines a unique identifier for the component instance

props.name: headerTemplate
props.description: Defines a custom template for the component's header

props.name: active
props.description: Gets or sets the component's active state, controlling its behavior and appearance

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, it disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the disabled state of the component changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: activeChange
events.description: Emits an event when the active state of the component changes

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emits an event when the component is clicked

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Gets the component's position and size statistics.
 *
 * @returns object with width, height, left, and top properties
 */
getStats()
